nodes.label: AI as time-saving drafting tool for complex communications
nodes.grounding_span: if I need to draft an e-mail for a particular client that I know will take a lot of time I'll request AI to put together the main body

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner for creative marketing tasks
nodes.grounding_span: for things like creating marketing materials I'll either work in conjunction with AI to create images or ask them to review images

nodes.label: AI as delegated analyst for data tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I'll feed in some analytical data from sales etc to compare against previous weeks/month and ask for tips on improving conversion rates

nodes.label: Human-led sales outreach preserved from AI
nodes.grounding_span: The actual sales outreach to clients I prefer to do myself

nodes.label: AI as competitive advantage in slow-adopting workplace
nodes.grounding_span: it gives me a slight advantage against others

nodes.label: AI as breakthrough tool for difficult client communication

nodes.label: AI as future autonomous background task handler
